title: Segfault on DELETE with WHERE containing OR
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t3(a Int32, b String, c Float64);
INSERT INTO t3(a, b, c) VALUES(1, 'lion', 3.14);
CREATE INDEX t3b ON t3(b) TYPE minmax;
DELETE FROM t3 WHERE b IS NULL OR c < 4.0;
CREATE TABLE t4(d Int32, e String);
key_bug_features: DELETE with OR in the WHERE clause
